data.content:
## Implementation Plan

### 1. Domain Model (src/domain/step_history.rs)
- Define StepRecord struct with fields: id, step, phase, from_state, to_state, status, actor_kind, agent_id, agent_name, agent_model, agent_version, agent_command, session_id, started_at, ended_at, metadata
- StepStatus enum: Started, Completed, Aborted, Failed

### 2. DB Migration v8 (src/db.rs)
- Add step_history_json TEXT column to knot_hot with default '[]'

### 3. Persistence (src/db.rs)
- Add step_history_json to UpsertKnotHot, get_knot_hot, list_knot_hot
- Add to KnotCacheRecord

### 4. KnotView (src/app.rs)
- Add step_history: Vec<StepRecord> field to KnotView
- Wire From<KnotCacheRecord> for KnotView

### 5. Claim (src/app.rs + src/poll_claim.rs)
- On claim, create StepRecord(status=Started) with agent metadata and push to step_history

### 6. Next (src/write_dispatch.rs)
- On next, finalize active step record: set to_state, ended_at, status=Completed

### 7. Step Annotate Command
- Add kno step annotate <id> for mid-flight agent metadata override

### 8. Tests
- Fresh claim creates structured step record
- Transitioning out closes record
- Repeated cycles produce multiple records
- show --json returns step_history field
